message:
fix: complete explicit-ID ephemeral routing across all storage layers (GH#2053)

PR #2054 fixed isActiveWisp() to handle explicit-ID ephemerals, but left
gaps in events.go, transaction.go, and batch operations. This patch
closes those gaps:

- events.go: Replace wispEventTable/wispCommentTable + IsEphemeralID
  pattern with direct isActiveWisp routing for AddComment, GetEvents,
  ImportIssueComment, GetIssueComments
- transaction.go: Add transaction-aware isActiveWisp that queries within
  the tx (sees uncommitted wisps); replace all 13 IsEphemeralID checks
- Batch operations: Add partitionByWispStatus (single-query batch check
  via batchWispExists) to replace pattern-only partitionIDs in
  GetCommentsForIssues, GetCommentCounts, GetDependencyRecordsForIssues,
  GetBlockingInfoForIssues, GetIssuesByIDs, GetLabelsForIssues,
  DeleteIssues

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
